agent_output:
**Plan Summary**

The implementation at `.tmp/findDuplicateOrderIds.ts` is already complete — a clean O(n) two-Set algorithm with a clear JSDoc comment. The only missing piece is the test file.

**What I'll create:** `.tmp/findDuplicateOrderIds.test.ts`

| AC | Test Coverage |
|----|--------------|
| AC1 | Returns IDs that appear >1× (single dup, multiple dups, tripled dup) |
| AC2 | Returns `[]` when no duplicates exist |
| AC3 | 1M IDs with ~1% dups completes in < 100ms (performance guard) |
| AC4 | Each duplicate appears exactly once in the result (no double-counting of triples) |
| AC5 | Returns `[]` for an empty input array |

Framework: Jest + ts-jest, matching the existing `.tmp/` pattern. No new dependencies.
